title: WarpDrive Extras
description: A WarpDrive addon meant to extend what computers can access!
body:
**WarpDrive Extras** adds a new block called the *Star System Viewer*. This block acts as both a ComputerCraft peripheral and an OpenComputers driver with a singular method: `view`.

This method then spits out a table listing all currently configured celestial bodies on a server.

This is all I am adding for now.
